tasks.title: Package scaffolding, pyproject.toml, and package layout
tasks.objective: Create the coder_waifu/ package tree, pyproject.toml with build-system, dependencies, scripts, and set up a local venv with pytest and ruff.
acceptance_criteria: python -m coder_waifu --help runs without ImportError after install
pyproject.toml declares python>=3.10 and hermes dependency
LICENSE contains MIT text

tasks.title: Core CLI framework with subcommands
tasks.objective: Implement coder-waifu CLI entry point using stdlib argparse or lightweight approach, with subcommands: init, run, status, resume, agents, --help. Route all user output through a persona-aware UI helper.
acceptance_criteria: coder-waifu --help lists all subcommands
coder-waifu init --help shows usage
coder-waifu run --help shows usage

tasks.title: Role definition YAML loader and built-in roles
tasks.objective: Implement roles/loader.py that discovers bundled YAML role definitions, validates schema, merges user `.coder-waifu/roles/` overrides, and exposes a role registry. Include 20 built-in YAML role definitions under coder_waifu/roles/builtins/.
outputs: role registry populated with 20 built-in roles
acceptance_criteria: roles/loader.py validates role YAML schema
builtins include 20 roles matching contract
user overrides merge correctly without mutating built-ins
verification_commands: .venv/bin/python -c 'from coder_waifu.roles.loader import load_roles; roles = load_roles(); assert len(roles) == 20'

tasks.title: Discovery question engine with selectable options + freeform Other
tasks.objective: Implement discovery/questions.py engine that accepts a question manifest, presents curated selectable options plus freeform Other, captures answers, and synthesizes reversible assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: Every question surfaces selectable options plus Other
Freeform answer always accepted even when options are shown
Output includes both chosen option and freeform text

tasks.title: Contract synthesis and persistence
tasks.objective: Implement discovery/contract_synth.py that takes discovery answers, lightweight research findings, and reversible assumptions, then writes the draft contract to .agent/contract.json for user approval.
acceptance_criteria: contract_synth produces valid JSON contract
contract.json contains objective, deliverables, constraints, discovery_phase section
Manually verified change when rerunning discovery overwrites with versioned revision

tasks.title: Orchestration spawner for adversarial agent pairs
tasks.objective: Implement orchestrate/spawner.py that accepts approved contract, selects roles, and dispatches 2 Hermes subagents per role via delegate_task batch mode with goal+context pairs. Collect summaries and write unified state.
acceptance_criteria: Each selected role yields 2 delegate_task calls in a single batch
Individual failures do not abort unrelated roles
Failure modes are recorded into task.open_findings, not swallowed silently

tasks.title: Checkpoint store with resume logic
tasks.objective: Implement checkpoint/store.py that writes JSON checkpoint files to .coder-waifu/checkpoints/, merges incremental state, and loads the latest valid checkpoint on resume.
acceptance_criteria: Writing one checkpoint and reading it back round-trips without data loss
Corrupt JSON file is detected and reported as BLOCKED with path to last valid checkpoint
Resume command restarts from the first pending task after verified ones

tasks.title: Scaffold command implementation
tasks.objective: Implement coder-waifu init <name> creating target directory, .coder-waifu/variables/ directory, optional README.md, and a placeholder .agent/contract.json.
outputs: coder-waifu init creates expected file tree
acceptance_criteria: Scaffolded directory contains README.md, .coder-waifu/, .agent/
Re-running init on existing directory fails with explicit error
No files outside the target directory are created

tasks.title: Unit tests for discovery, contract synthesis, CLI, and roles
tasks.objective: Comprehensive unit tests covering question engine, selectable + freeform paths, role loader edge cases, CLI subcommands with mocked callbacks.
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q passes with zero failures
Coverage of question engine includes selectable-only and freeform-only paths

tasks.title: Tests for spawner and checkpoint with mocks
tasks.objective: Unit and integration-style tests using mocks for Hermes delegate_task to validate spawner tuple dispatch, partial failure handling, and checkpoint round-trip/resume.
acceptance_criteria: Mock confirms delegate_task called with 2 tasks per role
Corrupt checkpoint triggers BLOCKED status with path exposure

tasks.title: E2E smoke test script
tasks.objective: Create a hermetic shell script `scripts/smoke_test.sh` that installs the package in tmp venv, runs coder-waifu init, runs coder-waifu run --dry-run, and asserts expected artifacts.
outputs: smoke test passes in clean venv
acceptance_criteria: Script exits 0 on successful run
Script detects smoke failures and exits non-zero
Script is POSIX-safe

tasks.title: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and architecture docs
tasks.objective: Write user-facing README with install instructions, CLI usage examples, role overview, discovery-phase overview, and contribution guide. Ensure persona is absent from README.
acceptance_criteria: README contains install, usage, role overview, discovery overview
Examples are syntactically valid
README contains no Coder-Waifu persona decoration
verification_commands: python3 -c 'import re; text=open("README.md").read(); assert re.search(r"coder-waifu run", text); assert "Role" in text'

tasks.title: Final verification gate: lint, format, type-check, tests, git audit
tasks.objective: Run full verification suite: pytest -q, ruff check ., optional mypy/pyright if available, full git diff review, confirm clean state. Write .agent/last-verification.json and mark DONE or BLOCKED.
acceptance_criteria: pytest -q passes with zero failures
ruff check . exits 0
Git status clean or only intended artifacts present
last-verification.json reflects actual pass/fail status

no_concurrent_execution_when: tasks modify shared schemas or migration files
tasks modify the same interface contract
blocked: Subagent delegation require Hermes runtime with valid provider auth; in environments lacking this, T-006 must fall back to terminal-based Hermes invocation instead of delegate_task
